'''Mark Field''' (born 21 March 1984) is an English former [[rugby league]] footballer who played in the 2000s. He played at club level for the [[Wakefield Trinity|Wakefield Trinity Wildcats]], and [[Dewsbury Rams]], as a {{rlp|fb|wg}} or {{rlp|ce}}.

== Outside of rugby league ==
Mark attended [[Royds Academy|Royds High School]] in Leeds.
